name: Build From Scratch
description: Build a complete TypeScript REST API from an empty project
goal: Build a complete Express REST API for a todo list application from scratch. Requirements: (1) GET /api/todos — returns all todos, (2) POST /api/todos — creates a todo with { title: string }, returns 201, (3) PUT /api/todos/:id — updates todo title, returns 200 or 404, (4) DELETE /api/todos/:id — deletes todo, returns 200 or 404, (5) All endpoints return JSON, (6) In-memory storage is fine, (7) TypeScript with strict mode, (8) Tests using Vitest that cover all endpoints.
